texts.SamplePageMessage: A sample page for the Paperbase module
texts.Document:AreYouSureToDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this document?
texts.Document:PermanentDeleteFailed: Failed to permanently delete the document.
texts.Document:AreYouSureToPermanentlyDelete: This operation cannot be undone. The document, related blobs and ALL derived business records (including any manual corrections made on them) will be permanently removed. Continue?
texts.Document:UnsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type. Please upload an image or PDF.
texts.Document:FileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 20 MB.
texts.Document:DropOrClick: Drag & drop a file here, or click to select
texts.Document:SupportedFormats: Supported: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, PDF
texts.Document:ProcessingMessage: Document is being processed. Fields will appear automatically once ready.
texts.Document:PendingReviewMessage: Document needs manual review. Use the reason below to choose or create a document type, or upload a better source file.
texts.Document:PreviewNotSupported: This file type can't be previewed inline. Download it to view.
texts.Document:Rerecognize:Confirm: Let AI re-recognize this document? It re-runs automatic classification on the existing text and re-extracts fields using the latest type and field descriptions. This overwrites the current document type (including any manual confirmation) and any manually edited field values. If the AI is no longer confident, the document returns to the manual review queue and its extracted fields are cleared until it is reclassified. The original file is not re-scanned.
texts.Document:RerecognizeQueued: Re-recognition started. Status will refresh shortly.
texts.Document:Pipeline:RetryQueued: Retry queued. Status will refresh shortly.
texts.Document:Review:RejectReasonHint: Optional. Recorded on the document for audit.
texts.Document:NoFieldValues: No field values yet. Click Edit to fill them in.
texts.DocumentType:Title: Document Types
texts.DocumentType:Empty: No document types yet. Create one to start classifying documents and extracting fields.
texts.DocumentType:TypeCodeHint: Identifier with segments separated by '.' (e.g. host.contract). Auto-suggested from the display name; you can edit it.
texts.DocumentType:TypeCodeInvalid: Only letters, digits, underscore and hyphen segments separated by '.' are allowed.
texts.DocumentType:ConfidenceThresholdHint: 0–1. Classifications below this value go to manual review.
texts.DocumentType:AreYouSureToDelete: Delete this document type? Its field definitions are removed too. Documents using it must be reclassified first.
texts.DocumentType:DeleteFailed: Failed to delete the document type.
texts.Cabinet:Title: Cabinets
texts.Cabinet:Empty: No cabinets yet. Create one to organize documents by group or batch.
texts.Cabinet:Name: Name
texts.Cabinet:NameHint: A cabinet groups documents by manual organization (e.g. Legal Dept, 2024 Project) — orthogonal to the AI document type.
texts.Cabinet:AreYouSureToDelete: Delete this cabinet? Documents in it become unfiled (they are not deleted).
texts.FieldDefinition:Title: Type-Bound Fields
texts.FieldDefinition:Empty: No fields defined for this type yet.
texts.FieldDefinition:Name: Name
texts.FieldDefinition:NameHint: Machine key used as the extraction JSON key. Auto-suggested from the display name; you can edit it.
texts.FieldDefinition:NameInvalid: Only letters, digits, underscore and hyphen are allowed (1–64 chars).
texts.FieldDefinition:PromptHint: Optional — tell the model what to extract. Leave blank to let it infer from the field name and type.
texts.FieldDefinition:AllowMultipleHint: Text fields only — stores a list of values (e.g. tags, parties).
texts.Paperbase:InvalidDocumentTypeCodeFormat: Document type code '{typeCode}' is not allowed. Must match pattern '{pattern}' (letters, digits, underscore, hyphen segments, optionally separated by '.'; no leading/trailing/consecutive '.').
texts.Paperbase:DocumentTypeCodeAlreadyExists: Document type code '{TypeCode}' is already in use (including soft-deleted records). Use a different code, or restore the existing one.
texts.Paperbase:DocumentTypeInUse: Document type '{TypeCode}' is still referenced by one or more documents. Reclassify those documents before deleting this type.
texts.Paperbase:DocumentTypeRestoreConflict: Cannot restore document type '{TypeCode}': another active document type with the same code already exists.
texts.Paperbase:FieldDefinitionAlreadyExists: Field '{Name}' is already defined on document type '{DocumentTypeCode}' (including soft-deleted records).
texts.Paperbase:FieldDefinitionRestoreConflict: Cannot restore field '{Name}' on document type '{DocumentTypeCode}': another active field with the same name already exists.
texts.Paperbase:FieldDefinitionParentTypeMissi: Cannot restore field '{Name}': the parent document type '{DocumentTypeCode}' is missing or still deleted. Restore the document type first.
texts.Paperbase:FieldDefinitionDataTypeChangeN: Cannot change the data type of field '{Name}': it already has extracted values stored. Create a new field instead.
texts.Paperbase:FieldDefinitionMultiValueRequi: Multi-value is only supported for Text fields, but '{dataType}' was requested. Use a Text field to allow multiple values.
texts.Paperbase:FieldDefinitionMultiValueChang: Cannot turn off multi-value on field '{Name}': it already has extracted values stored, and narrowing to single-value would orphan the extra values. Create a new field instead.
texts.Paperbase:InvalidFieldDefinitionName: Field name '{name}' is invalid. Names must match pattern '{pattern}' (letters, digits, underscore, hyphen; 1-64 chars).
texts.Paperbase:InvalidFieldDefinitionDisplayN: Field display name '{displayName}' contains control characters (newlines, tabs, etc.), which are not allowed.
texts.Paperbase:InvalidDocumentTypeDisplayName: Document type display name '{displayName}' contains control characters (newlines, tabs, etc.), which are not allowed.
texts.Paperbase:NoDocumentTypesConfigured: No document types are configured for this scope. Create at least one document type before uploading documents (Host admin via 'host.*' types; tenant admin via tenant-scoped types).
texts.Paperbase:MarkdownIsImmutable: Extracted markdown has already been set and cannot be changed.
texts.Paperbase:DocumentDuplicate: This file has already been uploaded ({FileName}).
texts.Paperbase:DocumentInRecycleBin: This file already exists in the recycle bin ({FileName}).
texts.Paperbase:DocumentFileTooLarge: File '{FileName}' exceeds the maximum allowed size of {MaxBytes} bytes.
texts.Paperbase:DocumentUnsupportedFileType: File '{FileName}' has an unsupported type ('{ContentType}'). Please upload a supported image or PDF.
texts.Paperbase:PipelineRetryInProgress: Pipeline '{PipelineCode}' already has an attempt in progress.
texts.Paperbase:PipelineNotRetryable: Pipeline '{PipelineCode}' is in '{Status}' state and cannot be retried.
texts.Paperbase:DocumentNotClassified: This document has no document type yet. Classify it before editing extracted fields.
texts.Paperbase:DocumentNotTextExtracted: This document has no extracted text yet. Re-recognition is available only after text extraction succeeds.
texts.Paperbase:UnknownExtractedField: Field '{FieldName}' is not defined on document type '{DocumentTypeCode}'.
texts.Paperbase:InvalidExtractedFieldValue: Field '{FieldName}' on document type '{DocumentTypeCode}' must be a valid {DataType} value.
texts.Paperbase:FieldTypeDoesNotSupportRange: Field '{FieldName}' is of type {DataType}, which supports only equality matching, not range (min/max) queries.
texts.Paperbase:FieldTypeNotQueryable: Field '{FieldName}' is of type {DataType} (long-form text), which cannot be used as a search filter.
texts.Paperbase:InvalidExportTemplateName: Export template name contains control characters (newlines, tabs, etc.), which are not allowed.
texts.Paperbase:ExportTemplateNameAlreadyExist: An export template named '{Name}' already exists.
texts.Paperbase:ExportTemplateRequiresColumn: An export template must define at least one column.
texts.Paperbase:ExportTemplateTooManyColumns: Too many columns ({count}); the maximum is {max}.
texts.Paperbase:ExportTemplateDuplicateColumnN: Duplicate column name '{columnName}'. Column names must be unique within a template.
texts.Paperbase:InvalidExportColumnName: Column name '{columnName}' contains control characters, which are not allowed.
texts.Paperbase:ExportDocumentLimitExceeded: The export matches {count} documents, exceeding the per-export limit of {max}. Narrow the filter or select fewer documents.
texts.ExportTemplate:Title: Export Templates
texts.ExportTemplate:Empty: No export templates yet. Create one to export document data as CSV / XLSX.
texts.ExportTemplate:Name: Name
texts.ExportTemplate:DeleteFailed: Failed to delete the export template.
texts.Paperbase:InvalidCabinetName: Cabinet name '{name}' contains control characters (newlines, tabs, etc.), which are not allowed.
texts.Paperbase:CabinetNameAlreadyExists: A cabinet named '{Name}' already exists in this scope.
texts.Paperbase:InvalidCabinetId: The selected cabinet does not exist in this scope.
